meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't monetize skills. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Scale Your Freelance Output Fast
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to monetize your coding skills. Learn to use AI-driven debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and increase your margins.
content.answer_block: Monetization bottlenecks stem from slow delivery and high maintenance overhead. By integrating AI-driven debugging into your workflow, you transform from a manual coder into an architectural orchestrator. Using tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can automate root-cause analysis, slash deployment times, and ship production-grade software at double the speed.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a screen at 2 AM, buried in a legacy codebase that refuses to compile, while your client’s deadline looms like a guillotine. The gap between your technical ability and your bank balance isn't a lack of skill; it's a lack of velocity. When you spend 80% of your billable hours fighting syntax errors instead of shipping features, you aren't a freelancer—you're a victim of your own technical debt.

The shift happens when you stop treating AI as a chatbot and start treating it as your lead engineer. By leveraging CLI-native tools like Claude Code and environment-aware agents like Antigravity, you move from 'debugging' to 'automated resolution,' effectively compressing weeks of effort into hours of high-leverage execution.

steps.title: Establish the Contextual Baseline
steps.description: Before debugging, you must map the current architecture to identify where the logic breaks down. This prevents AI hallucination by grounding it in your specific file structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory structure and identify the primary entry points for the authentication service. Summarize the dependency graph for the failing module.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Vector
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a surgical search for the error, ensuring you aren't wasting tokens on irrelevant files.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan the logs provided in the terminal output and correlate them with the specific lines in the user-controller.ts file. Identify the exact line where the promise rejection occurs.

steps.title: Automated Hypothesis Testing
steps.description: Let the AI propose a fix based on the stack trace, but force it to explain the trade-offs before implementation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose three potential fixes for the race condition identified. Evaluate each based on performance overhead and maintainability. Choose the most efficient approach.

steps.title: Implementation and Validation
steps.description: Apply the fix using the AI agent, then immediately run a regression test to ensure no side effects were introduced.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply the selected fix to the user-controller.ts file. Ensure the error handling block is wrapped in a proper try-catch and add a descriptive log statement.

steps.title: Hardening the Codebase
steps.description: Use the final step to generate unit tests for the bug you just fixed to ensure it never returns, increasing your perceived value to the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Jest test suite that covers the edge case that caused this bug. Ensure 100% branch coverage for the modified function.

pro_tips: Always force your AI agents to output a 'risk assessment' before applying changes to prevent breaking production builds.
Use Claude Code's `--memory` flag to maintain state across multiple debugging sessions for complex legacy monoliths.
Map your project documentation into the Antigravity context window to ensure the AI follows your specific coding standards and naming conventions.
Never accept the first solution; ask the AI to 'critique its own logic' to uncover hidden edge cases you might have missed.
Automate the creation of a 'technical debt report' for your clients after every debug session to justify your premium hourly rate.
content.next_steps: Once you have automated your debugging workflow, begin documenting your 'fix library' to build a custom knowledge base, allowing you to solve repetitive client issues in seconds rather than hours.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading your time for slow, manual labor and start building high-value, high-margin software. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
